rewritten_screens: ThaumonomiconScreen.java: category tabs, research tree, node selection, parent lines, locked/available/complete states
ResearchTableScreen.java: original-like aspect wheel/theory progress interaction
ArcaneWorkbenchScreen.java: original-like 3x3 arcane grid overlay, vis bar and primal cost row
honest_limits: This is stronger original-like behavior but still not the full TC4 backend.
True parity still needs server-side key-specific research packets, real research minigame solving, real vis network integration and original entity renderers.
